title: Gone But Not Forgotten
summary: Find the secret flag within this extracted .img file.
scenario: I stole this computer from someone, but they deleted the one file I needed from them. Find it for me.
learningObjectives: Learn the foremost and/or autopsy tool

artifacts.name: laptop.img
artifacts.purpose: The .img file that students must forensically analyze to get the secret flag.

hints: Carve with foremost where -i is input and -o is output
Mount the .img to Autopsy and browse the file treetree
If you really hated using Autopsy or Foremost, just string it

llmHandoff.scope: This folder is the full scope for the challenge.
llmHandoff.implementNext: Replace placeholder artifacts and write the real challenge files.
llmHandoff.doNotDoYet: Do not touch the portal frontend unless the challenge schema changes.
